issue_summary: Update Apache Commons Lang from 3.10 to 3.11. org.apache.commons.text.lookup.AbstractStringLookup
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Returns the substring after the first occurrence of {@code ch} in {@code value}.
     *
     * @param value The source string.
     * @param ch The character to search.
     * @return a new string.
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Returns the substring after the first occurrence of {@code ch} in {@code value}.
     *
     * @param value The source string.
     * @param ch The character to search.
     * @return a new string.
     * @deprecated Use {@link StringUtils#substringAfter(String, int)}.
     */
